task_objective: Fix QAM dropdown autopopulation so it can use the SteamOS Home/Library focused or selected game, not only a running game, and explain why reinstalling over an active Decky plugin may require unloading the old version first.
design_decisions: The previous Router.MainRunningApp implementation only represented a running game and could not satisfy Home/Library hover or selected-game behavior.

Added a best-effort read-only SteamUI context resolver that checks focused or hovered React-owned app props, Library app routes, appStore, and collectionStore before falling back to Router.MainRunningApp.
Cached focused Home/Library context only briefly so stale focus does not override the saved dropdown selection long after navigation changes.
Kept alwaysRender enabled and did not patch Steam context menus for this QAM behavior.

results.red_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_frontend_static.py failed with the new Home/Library context assertions before implementation
results.pnpm_verify: passed after rerunning with network access because sandboxed pnpm audit failed with EAI_AGAIN
